title: Simple Survival Immersion - SSI
description: A simple, realistic and immersive modpack for any type of survival/server on Minecraft, offering a gameplay comfort identical to vanilla.
body:
# **Welcome to the Minecraft Immersion Experience!**

**Hey there and welcome!** 👋

I created this **modpack** for my personal use, but over time my **community** kept asking me to share it. So here it is! This is the modpack I use **every day**, whether for **content creation** or simply to enjoy playing Minecraft. 🎮 *(It works perfectly for multiplayer.)*

***

### **What makes it special?**

This modpack doesn’t reinvent everything, but it will **subtly enhance your gameplay**! 🚀

* **Improved game animations** 🕹️
* **Enhanced chat** 📱
* **Refined skins & interface** 🎨
* **Optimized hotbar & item descriptions** ⚙️

It adds a **realistic, immersive layer** to vanilla Minecraft while staying true to the game’s spirit. No drastic changes — just a **better overall experience**!

***

### **Regular updates!** 🔄

This modpack is **frequently updated** with new mods, **resource packs**, or **shaders**. Since it’s the one I use **daily**, you can expect **continuous updates**. 🎉

***

### **One more project?**

I’m also working on an **adventure modpack**! If you’re interested, stay tuned… 😉  
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/funcube-adventure-rpg](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/funcube-adventure-rpg)

***

### **🌍 Multiplayer / Official FunCube Server (Coming Soon!)**

The official **FunCube server** is currently **in preparation and arriving very soon**! Get ready for an epic **RPG & Hack & Slash** adventure running on version **1.21.11**. 

FunCube has been around for almost 5 years, developed and actively maintained by me. Once the new server officially releases, a dedicated button will be added directly into the modpack's main menu for anyone who wants to jump in and join the action! ⚔️🌿

Want to be the first to know when it opens? **Join our Discord!**

***

**💡 Recommended hosting (discount)** Get **10% off at MineStrator** with code **“Courone”**. You’ll also find a **step-by-step guide** to set up your server and install the modpack.
